description_long: This object is a vintage CRT computer monitor with a built-in VCR slot, characterized by a boxy, robust form and a slightly curved glass display. The front features a thick, matte-finished plastic bezel surrounding the screen, with a control panel and VCR slot integrated below the display. The sides and rear are vented with perforated patterns for heat dissipation, and the back panel includes various ports, slots, and a recessed handle for carrying. The monitor is primarily a muted beige or light gray color, typical of electronics from the late 20th century. The surface appears hard and slightly textured, with minimal decorative elements aside from a small brand logo below the screen. This type of monitor would commonly be found in offices, schools, or urban recycling areas.
description: A vintage beige CRT computer monitor with a built-in VCR slot, thick bezel, and vented sides and back. The surface is hard, matte, and slightly textured, with a small brand logo below the screen.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved glass screen, thick plastic bezel, integrated VCR slot, control buttons, and a small brand logo below the display.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the vented panel, a recessed carrying handle, and the monitor's boxy depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displays multiple vented sections, various ports and slots, and a central recessed area, emphasizing the monitor's utilitarian design.
description_view_3: Right side view is mostly plain with vented areas, mirroring the left but without a handle.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and made of matte beige plastic, with squared corners and a slightly textured surface. It frames the display area with no color contrast or decorative elements, except for a small brand logo at the bottom center.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor has an integrated flat base that is part of the main body, extending slightly forward to support the VCR slot. The base is made of the same beige plastic and does not appear to have any visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on the front panel below the screen, grouped together to the left of the VCR slot.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear panel, with several ports and slots present, but exact types and numbers are not clearly distinguishable.
attribute_brand_logo: A small brand logo is visible on the front bezel, centered below the screen, in a subtle contrasting color.
